name: China Stopover — Beijing (4 Days)
title: China Stopover — Beijing (4 Days)
shortDescription: Experience China's capital with visits to iconic landmarks including the Great Wall, Forbidden City, and imperial palaces in this carefully curated Beijing stopover.
highlights: Summer Palace with Marble Boat and Long Corridor

itinerary.title: Arrival Beijing
itinerary.description: Airport transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Tiananmen Square
itinerary.description: Visit Tiananmen Square, Forbidden City (nearly 10,000 rooms), and Beihai Park. Evening Peking Duck Banquet.

itinerary.title: Great Wall
itinerary.description: Great Wall at Juyongguan section. Jade carving factory. Ming Tombs (Chang Tomb).

itinerary.title: Summer Palace
itinerary.description: Summer Palace and gardens, Marble Boat and Long Corridor. Olympic venues photo stop. Pearl Factory. Temple of Heaven.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Free time until airport transfer.

name: China Stopover — Beijing Express (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Beijing Express (3 Days)
shortDescription: A perfect blend of history, culture, and culinary delights! This Beijing stopover combines iconic landmarks, cultural experiences, and authentic dining.
highlights: Tiananmen Square and the Forbidden City
Pedicab tour through historic Hutong neighbourhoods
Free time for exploration and shopping

itinerary.title: Arrival in Beijing
itinerary.description: Airport transfer. Tiananmen Square and Forbidden City tour. Evening Peking Duck Banquet.

itinerary.title: Beijing
itinerary.description: Great Wall at Juyongguan section. Jade factory visit. Pedicab tour of Hutong neighbourhoods. Local family visit.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Free time to explore or shop before airport transfer.

name: China Stopover — Shanghai (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Shanghai (3 Days)
shortDescription: Explore dynamic and beautiful Shanghai on China's east coast, experiencing the city's transformation from a sleepy fishing town to a modern metropolis of skyscrapers and modern lifestyle.
highlights: Old Town with winding alleyways, shops, and teahouses

itinerary.title: Arrival Shanghai
itinerary.description: Airport pickup and hotel transfer.

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: Old Town exploration. Yu Garden visit. Silk Spinning Mill tour. Shanghai Museum. Bund walk. Huangpu River cruise.

itinerary.title: Shanghai Departure
itinerary.description: Free time until airport transfer.

name: China Stopover — Shanghai Express (2 Days)
title: China Stopover — Shanghai Express (2 Days)
shortDescription: See the best Shanghai has to offer! This compact stopover showcases Shanghai's historic and modern attractions in an efficient timeframe.
highlights: China Town exploration with traditional alleyways
Tianzifang bohemian district with Shikumen architecture

itinerary.title: Arrival Shanghai
itinerary.description: Guided visits to China Town, Yu Garden, Tianzifang, and the Bund. Huangpu River cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure Shanghai
itinerary.description: Morning airport transfer for departure.

name: China Stopover — Chengdu (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Chengdu (3 Days)
shortDescription: This stopover showcases Chengdu, capital of Sichuan province, known as 'The Land of Abundance'. Explore the region's natural heritage and cultural attractions.
highlights: Giant Panda Breeding and Research Centre

itinerary.title: Arrival in Chengdu
itinerary.description: Guide meets at airport. Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Panda Centre & City
itinerary.description: Giant Panda Breeding and Research Centre. Tea house at People's Park. Explore Jinli Street and Broad and Narrow Alley.

itinerary.title: Chengdu Departure
itinerary.description: Visit Dujiangyan Irrigation System. Transfer to airport.

name: China Stopover — Guilin (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Guilin (3 Days)
shortDescription: Explore Guilin's scenic landscapes featuring a Li River cruise to Yangshuo, limestone cave exploration, and iconic mountain formations.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Guilin
itinerary.description: Guide meets at arrival. Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Guilin/Yangshuo/Guilin
itinerary.description: 5–6 hour Li River cruise through scenic mountain formations. Visit Yangshuo market. Pearl Museum visit upon return.

itinerary.title: Guilin Departure
itinerary.description: Reed Flute Cave (stalactites and stalagmites). Elephant Trunk Hill. Transfer to airport.

name: China Stopover — Xi'an (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Xi'an (3 Days)
shortDescription: Immerse yourself in the rich history of Xi'an, China's ancient capital, with experiences centred on archaeological treasures and cultural landmarks.
highlights: 2,000-year-old Terracotta Warriors with Circle Vision Movie
Traditional dumpling banquet with cultural show

itinerary.title: Arrival in Xi'an
itinerary.description: Airport pickup and hotel transfer.

itinerary.title: Xi'an Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Terracotta Warriors Museum. Ceramic and lacquer ware factory. Muslim Quarter walking tour, Great Mosque. Evening dumpling banquet with cultural performance.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Shaanxi History Museum (closed Mondays). Airport transfer.

name: China Stopover — Guangzhou (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Guangzhou (3 Days)
shortDescription: Transform a lengthy journey into a rejuvenating escape. Explore vibrant streets, sample traditional Cantonese cuisine, and experience the city's relaxed pace.
highlights: Nanfeng Kiln and Shiwan pottery centre
Ancestral Temple with Ming Dynasty architecture
Six Banyan Temple and Hua Ta Pagoda

itinerary.title: Arrival Guangzhou
itinerary.description: Guide meets travellers. Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Guangzhou — Foshan
itinerary.description: Nanfeng Kiln in Shiwan. Zu Miao temple. Liang's Gardens. Lingnan Xintiandi. Return to Guangzhou.

itinerary.title: Guangzhou Departure
itinerary.description: Chen Family Academy. Six Banyan Temple and Hua Ta Pagoda. Qingping market. Shamian Island. Yuexiu Park and Canton Tower. Airport transfer.

name: China Stopover — Shanghai & Suzhou (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Shanghai & Suzhou (3 Days)
shortDescription: A vibrant fusion of tradition and modernity through Shanghai's old quarters, artistic neighbourhoods, and riverfront, plus Suzhou's water-town charm and elegant gardens.
highlights: Yu Garden and Tianzifang bohemian area
The Bund promenade and Huangpu River cruise
Garden of the Master of Fishing Net

itinerary.title: Arrival Shanghai
itinerary.description: Airport pickup. Visit Yu Garden, explore Tianzifang (Shikumen houses), stroll the Bund. Huangpu River cruise.

itinerary.title: Suzhou
itinerary.description: Day trip to Suzhou. Garden of the Master of Fishing Net. Silk Spinning Mill. Canal boat cruise on ancient waterway. Shan Tang Street. Return to Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai Departure
itinerary.description: Airport transfer.

name: China Stopover — Shanghai & Wuzhen (4 Days)
title: China Stopover — Shanghai & Wuzhen (4 Days)
shortDescription: Explore Shanghai's modern attractions combined with the timeless beauty of Wuzhen, the peerless water town in the south of the Yangtze River.
highlights: Shanghai Old Town and Yu Garden

itinerary.title: Arrival Shanghai
itinerary.description: Airport pickup and hotel transfer.

itinerary.title: Shanghai
itinerary.description: Old Town, Yu Garden, Silk Spinning Mill, Shanghai Museum. Evening Bund stroll and Huangpu River cruise.

itinerary.title: Wuzhen
itinerary.description: Day trip to Wuzhen scenic area (2-hour drive). Traditional residences, workshops. Return to Shanghai.

itinerary.title: Shanghai Departure
itinerary.description: Free time until airport transfer.

name: China Stopover — Guilin & Surrounds (4 Days)
title: China Stopover — Guilin & Surrounds (4 Days)
shortDescription: Discover breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural heritage through visits to limestone caves, terraced mountains, ethnic villages, and a scenic Li River cruise.
highlights: Dragon's Backbone rice terraces at Longsheng
Li River cruise through karst scenery

itinerary.title: Arrival & Reed Flute Cave
itinerary.description: Guide meets at arrival. Hotel transfer. Visit Reed Flute Cave (if time allows).

itinerary.title: Guilin — Longsheng — Guilin
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Longsheng. Longji area, Zhuang and Yao Minority villages, Dragon's Backbone summit. Pearl Museum.

itinerary.title: Guilin — Yangshuo
itinerary.description: Li River cruise through karst mountains, villages, fishermen on bamboo rafts. Explore Yangshuo's local market.

itinerary.title: Yangshuo — Guilin
itinerary.description: Morning free time with optional bike rentals to explore karst landscapes. Transfer to Guilin airport.

name: China Stopover — Zhangjiajie (3 Days)
title: China Stopover — Zhangjiajie (3 Days)
shortDescription: Experience Zhangjiajie's stunning natural landscapes, including Tianmen Mountain, the Bailong Elevator, and the famous Glass Bridge — the inspiration for Avatar.
highlights: Cable car, glass skywalk, and Guigu Cliff Path
Bailong Elevator — world's fastest sightseeing elevator
Yuanjiajie, First Bridge Under Heaven, Tianzi Mountain

itinerary.title: Guangzhou — Zhangjiajie
itinerary.description: Morning train from Guangzhou. Tianmen Mountain National Forest Park: cable car, eco shuttle, escalator at Tianmen Cave, glass skywalk.

itinerary.title: Zhangjiajie
itinerary.description: Bailong Elevator to Yuanjiajie. Mihun Stage, First Bridge Under Heaven, Tianzi Mountain. Cable car descent.

itinerary.title: Zhangjiajie Departure
itinerary.description: Zhangjiajie Grand Canyon Glass Bridge. Transfer to railway station, return to Guangzhou.

name: China Stopover — Guangzhou & Shenzhen (4 Days)
title: China Stopover — Guangzhou & Shenzhen (4 Days)
shortDescription: Explore the dynamic city of Shenzhen with futuristic skyscrapers, vibrant shopping districts, and rich cultural landmarks. Experience innovation, cuisine, and a fusion of tradition and modernity.
highlights: Lotus Hill Park and Deng Xiaoping Sculpture
Wutong Mountain — highest peak in Shenzhen
Ping An Finance Centre observation deck

itinerary.title: Guangzhou — Shenzhen
itinerary.description: Coach from Guangzhou to Shenzhen (~2 hours). Lotus Hill Park and Deng Xiaoping Sculpture.

itinerary.title: Shenzhen Bay Park
itinerary.description: Shenzhen Bay Park coastal greenway with mangroves. Afternoon: Splendid China + Folk Culture Village with ethnic performances.

itinerary.title: Wutong Mountain
itinerary.description: Climb Wutong Mountain. Shenzhen Museum. Dongmen Pedestrian Street.

itinerary.title: Ping An Finance Centre — Departure
itinerary.description: Ping An Finance Centre Cloud Top Observation Deck. Free time. Transfer to Guangzhou Baiyun Airport.

name: China Stopover — Huangshan (4 Days)
title: China Stopover — Huangshan (4 Days)
shortDescription: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Huangshan with a scenic cable car ride up Yellow Mountain, overnight stay atop the mountain, and visits to UNESCO-listed Hongcun and Nanping villages.
highlights: Cable car ride up Yellow Mountain
Tunxi Old Street and Ink Factory
UNESCO-listed Hongcun village (Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon filming location)

itinerary.title: Tunxi (Huangshan)
itinerary.description: Arrival in Tunxi (Huangshan). Guide meets and transfers to hotel.

itinerary.title: Tunxi — Mt. Huangshan
itinerary.description: Cable car ascent to Yellow Mountain. View Summit of Brightness, Beginning-to-believe Peak, Dropped Rock, Paiyun Pavilion, 'Monkey viewing the sea'.

itinerary.title: Mt. Huangshan — Tunxi
itinerary.description: Watch magnificent sunrise (weather permitting). Explore mountain. Cable car down. Tunxi Old Street and Ink Factory.

itinerary.title: Yixian — Nanping — Tunxi
itinerary.description: Visit Hongcun village (UNESCO, Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon location) and Nanping village (Judou location). Airport transfer.
